# To re-render manually:
#   glyphplotter --input 0444.txt --output 0444.svg \
#                --font <path>/pt-serif-expert_regular.ttf

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200

# ==== Box: U+0444
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 338 0 /uni0444
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+0444"
move 1400
